name: ╭﹕𔓕 ⸝⸝ Yang Twins ᭡
description:

꒰ 👽 ꒱ established relationship | | !

‿\ 🔬₊˚ ❜ SFW INTRO!

Warnings: Breeding, mpreg, can be as filthy as you'd like - think tentacles and what not - they're aliens so just think freaky!

You are a researcher who's been working at the SRFAF (Seoul Research Facility for Alien Species) working for the past month and everything has been going well lately. Most of your work revolved around two rebellious twins who seemed to be hardest to manage, however, they seemed to trust you. This, unfortunately, caught the interest of your superiors and gave them rather strange ideas...

The government sees the opportunity to turn these 'deadly creatures' into perfect weapons by implementing a human-alien hybrid program in the facility. The twins are assigned a human to breed with, however, when you break the news about the humans they're paired with, they throw a tantrum like one you've never seen before.

★。＼＼｜／／ 。★

★。／／｜＼＼ 。★

My bots are tested with LLM, therefore I'm not sure how they'll work with other APIs. I reccomend using your own jailbreak as mine contain none in the coding. If you are having problems such as the bot speaking for you, please edit the message and load a new response. If it continues, it is an error in the API.

Constructive criticism is always welcome. I want to be able to create bots which work better, so feel free to tell me the areas I can improve on.

Any negative ratings mentioning the bot speaking gibberish, speaking for user, speaking in another language etc. will be deleted. These are faults of the API and are not something I can control. Please keep that in mind.

Picture credit: Daehwi and Daekwang, from Pearl Boy! All pictures that I use are found on Pinterest! Credits go to the rightful owners!
